about.intro: I architect and deliver enterprise-grade digital platforms that balance business velocity with engineering rigour — from cloud-native microservices and headless CMS ecosystems to AI-powered automation at scale.
pillars: Cloud-native systems on AWS, Azure & GCP
AI solutions, conversational interfaces & LLM integration
Headless CMS, composable commerce & content platforms
Engineering leadership, team scaling & delivery excellence
